# field-hockey-coaching - gemini-cli

This directory is the generated target-specific view of the family.

Artifact contract: Local Gemini CLI skill bundle for filesystem install.

Editing rule:

- Edit `source/*.md` for canonical skill content.
- Re-run `skill-deploy` to regenerate this directory.

Files in this directory:

- `family.skill` is the aggregated family reference text.
- `*.skill` files are the per-skill Gemini CLI bundle text.
- `manifest.json` records the generated bundle metadata.
